channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: When Is The Saros Review Embargo Date? Saros Review Countdown
item.content:encoded:
One of Sony’s biggest hopes of 2026 falls on the shoulders of Saros—the new release from the excellent Housemarque. Considering the team’s most recent work and entire portfolio, there’s a big hope that Saros will review well.

Let me start by saying I love Housemarque. I’ve been on their train since Super Stardust HD on the PS3. The studio has a certain panache and brilliance that few studios can match, and the team has done this consistently for over 15 years.

Many (including myself) are hoping that Saros reviews are amazing, and it becomes Housemarque’s magnum opus.

Saros Review Embargo Date, Explained

It’s been revealed that the Saros review embargo lifts on April 24, giving you plenty of time to digest critical opinion before launch.

I would say it’s good news that the review embargo is a few days before release. This means Housemarque is confident in its game and expects good reviews to come flooding out and convince you all to pre-purchase in the days leading up to go time.

  • More Insider Gaming: Saros Release Date & Start Times

Returnal scored a phenomenal 86/100 on Metacritic when all was said and done. Nex Machina: Death Machine stands at 88/100, Resogun 84/100, and the list goes on. The developer rarely (if ever) misses.

Expect Saros to score around the same as Returnal—if not higher come April 24.

Saros Review Embargo Release Times

The review embargo officially lifts at 12 AM PT.

You Pacific Time inhabitants might have to gut it out and stay up late if you want to see the reviews! To be honest, it’s not much better for the rest of America or a lot of the world.

  • More Insider Gaming: Does Saros Have Early Access? Saros Demo Status, Explained

Review embargo confirmation comes from the ever-reliable GermanStrands, who posted the details on X on April 15:

“People are already able to play Saros. The review embargo lifts on April 24 at 12 AM PT, which is 6 days before the official release.”

Obviously, this could be adjusted between now and April 15, and if it happens, I’ll update this guide as quickly as a flash to reflect this.

Take a look at the Saros review embargo across the world.

Which region do you fall into? More importantly, what are you expecting (and hoping) Saros finishes on once the Metacritic reviews are complete? Share your predictions and guesses via our free-to-join Insider Gaming Discord.

For more on the game, make sure you know all about Saros’ game file size and preload Date.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1762: Hints and Answer for April 16, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1762 for April 16, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, April 16, 2026

Today’s Wordle answer for game #1762 will give you a challenge. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 5.5 out of 6 guesses. That makes it just about the same as the 5.6-guess average from April 15.

General Wordle Hints For April 16

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: It’s an old unit of measurement.
  • Hint 2: It was commonly based on the length of part of the human body.
  • Hint 3: You’ll often see it referenced in historical or ancient contexts.
  • Hint 4: It’s especially associated with early civilizations and construction.

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1762 for April 16, 2026.

Starter Words For April 16, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • BUILT
  • COURT
  • TUBER
  • CUMIN

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1762 On April 16, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: CUBIT

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

CUBIT is a noun that means “an ancient linear unit based on the length of the forearm, from elbow to the tip of the middle finger, usually from 17 to 21 inches (43 to 53 centimeters).”

Yesterday’s Wordle Answer

If you missed the previous game, here’s yesterday’s Wordle answer for Game #1761 on April 15, 2026

Answer: BEGUN

While not always the case, looking at previous words can sometimes give you insight into common patterns or letter usage in Wordle puzzles.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1762

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads up. The game on April 17 will be Wordle Game #1763.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

MOBILE APP

item.title: Phantom Blade Zero Honor System Will Influence Main Story
item.content:encoded:
Phantom Blade Zero’s director has revealed that your actions of honor in side quests can influence the main quests.

S-Game’s upcoming Wuxia-based action RPG, Phantom Blade Zero, is all set to release in September 2026 for PlayStation 5 and PC. Ahead of the release, the developers have revealed only a few details about the game, such as that the boss can analyze and adapt to different situations. Now, we have been informed about one of the other systems of the game.

Phantom Blade Zero Side Quest Actions Will Influence the Main Story

During a recent interview, S-Game CEO and creator of Phantom Blade Zero, Soulframe Liang (aka Qiwei Liang), was discussing the game’s Wuxia elements when the term “actions of honor” was mentioned. The CEO first spoke about breaking it down into two aspects, ‘Wu’ and ‘Xia’. Wu is an external expression that is manifested through martial arts combat. To implement this, the developers have visited numerous martial arts schools, explored options, and drawn inspiration from classic Wuxia films.

On the other hand, the ‘Xia’ aspect is considered more important to developers, as it refers to the ‘interior.’ The essence of Xia is that even when the character is in the worst situation imaginable, they will be thinking about others, Liang explained.

The director then discussed how they will bring the spirit of ‘Xia’ in Phantom Blade Zero’s gameplay, which led to the discussion about the honor system. Liang spoke about the main quests and side quests in ARPGs and RPGs, stating that main quests are for facing your own conflicts, while side quests have players encountering strangers by chance, and those characters have their own stories, and the player is just a passerby.

However, helping others can create a butterfly effect, Liang stated. He explained that when the player acts with honor, they “might actually influence” the main questline and their “own story of vengeance and love”. The developer emphasized that as long as the player acts according to their “code of honor” and does the “right things”, they will discover that their actions will have “a bigger, more macroscopic impact.”

In other news, S-GAME, the studio behind Phantom Blade Zero, has spoken out against the use of artificial intelligence in game development. What are your thoughts on Phantom Blade Zero featuring an honor system that affects the main questline? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Red Dead Redemption receiving a physical edition for the PS5. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Red Dead Redemption Physical Edition Coming To PS5
item.content:encoded:
A physical copy of Red Dead Redemption Remastered is releasing on PS5. It means you can add another physical edition of RDR to your collection, and also highlights a lack of RDR 2 love lately.

Back in 2025, Red Dead Redemption owners got a free upgrade. It gives the legendary game a nice graphical and performance overhaul, and makes RDR a Western joy to play. It was weird that Red Dead didn’t get a physical disc for PS5, but Rockstar Games was clearly fooling us all and biding its time.

Red Dead Redemption PS5 Physical Disc Releasing May 7

If you go to Wakkap (source credit goes to Portal Viciados) and search for Red Dead Redemption, you’ll see all the other editions we’ve come to know on PS4, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch, etc, but there’s a new PS5 physical edition.

It’s priced at €32.90 (approximately just under $40), and the website has listed a May 7 release date.

At the time of writing, nowhere else seems to have gotten the memo on a Red Dead Redemption PS5 Physical launch just yet, but unless this is a wild mistake, expect more online retailers and outlets to start advertising this as well.

It’s also apparent that only the PlayStation 5 is being advertised for now, but more formats could be announced as well.

If you need something to play, or you’re just desperate for more Red Dead, this might be what you need. It’s claimed that a Red Dead Redemption 2 Enhanced Edition is still coming ‘this year,’ and it’s high time we got it!

Adding a physical Red Dead Redemption PS5 edition to your collection might be a necessity. Rockstar Games continues to have a ton of success from its older games, making us wait impatiently for GTA 6. Let us know if you’re going to buy it by popping over to the Insider Gaming Discord.

Check out the PlayStation Plus April 2026 Game Catalog Titles being revealed, and the GTA leak raising Take-Two Interactive stock value by over $1 billion for more news.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: PlayStation Plus Game Catalog Titles for April 2026 Officially Confirmed
item.content:encoded:
The official announcement for PlayStation Plus Game Catalog and Classic Catalog games for April 2026 has arrived.

Earlier today, a reliable insider revealed that “Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered,” “The Crew Motorfest,” and “Football Manager 2026” will be available on PS Plus Extra this month. These games have now been confirmed, and additional titles have also been revealed for PS Plus Extra and Premium members for April.

PlayStation Plus Game Catalog Features 7 Games in April 2026

A new post on the PlayStation blog confirms the PS Plus Game Catalog editions for April 2026. The biggest title is Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered, and also the Complete Edition, which will be available for PS4 players. The Crew Motorfest is another great pick for the adrenaline junkies. Then there’s also a game being added to the collection this month that comes out of the developer’s wildest imagination: Squirrel with a Gun, and it’s just what the title suggests.

Check out the full list of games coming to PlayStation Plus Game Catalog this month:

  • The Crew Motorfest | PS5, PS4 
  • Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered | PS5, PS4
  • Football Manager 26 Console | PS5
  • Warriors: Abyss | PS5, PS4
  • Squirrel with a Gun | PS5
  • The Casting of Frank Stone | PS5 
  • Monster Train | PS5 

Classics Catalog Game for April

PlayStation Plus Premium members will receive only one additional game from the Classics Catalog in April 2026. Wild Arms 4 will be arriving on PS5 and PS4 as a PS2 title that features up-rendering enhancements, rewind, quick save, and custom video filters.

In other news, Sony has announced its brand-new Inzone gaming product lineup. Additionally, here are all the free monthly games for April, including Lords of the Fallen, Tomb Raider 1-3 Remastered, and more. What are your thoughts on the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog and Classics Catalog additions for April 2026? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about the full patch notes for WWE 2K26 update 1.08. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: How Much Is Xbox Game Pass In 2026? Is Xbox Game Pass Too Expensive, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Xbox Game Pass was one of the first gaming subscription services, and it was introduced back in June 2017, with over 100 titles on offer. Now, almost nine years later, over 500 games can be downloaded and played, with a variety of subscription tiers available to cater to various entry points.

However, whilst the service may have expanded over the years, so has its price risen, and way more than once. What used to be an affordable way to play tons of games is now a service that many skip out on due to its price.

But is Xbox Game Pass too expensive? Insider Gaming has broken down the notion below.

How Much Is Xbox Game Pass? Every Tier, Explained

Currently, Xbox Game Pass has four tiers, with the cheapest coming in at $9.99 a month, and the most expensive tripling that fee to reach $29.99 a month.

  • More Insider Gaming: Should You Buy Xbox Game Pass?

Here are the four tiers of Xbox Game Pass, as well as their relative costs per month, adjusted for multiple currencies.

Generally speaking, if you want a chance at playing the latest and greatest games on offer, you’d want to subscribe to Game Pass Premium. But coming in at essentially $30 a month, it’s a tough ask for the average gamer, and it’s led to some tough conversations about the service’s pricing.

Is Xbox Game Pass Too Expensive?

Xbox’s new CEO, Asha Sharma, recently admitted that Xbox Game Pass has become too expensive.

If the company’s own CEO thinks that the subscription service is too expensive, then it probably is! Xbox have hiked the prices numerous times over the years, but the toughest pill to swallow was in October 2025, when the Ultimate Tier was bumped by 50% in some regions.

  • More Insider Gaming: How To Cancel Xbox Game Pass

Naturally, that caused a wave of outrage amongst fans, with many deciding to cancel their subscription altogether. Sharma has made it clear that one of her priorities is to evolve Game Pass into a more flexible system, though she admitted that it’d take time to test and learn around.

When those changes could come into play remains a mystery. It’s unlikely that Xbox will cheapen the pre-existing tiers, though there have been rumors suggesting that new tiers could be implemented in the future.

Ultimately, it’s down to individual financial status when deciding if something is too expensive, but even so, there does seem to be a general consensus that Xbox Game Pass doesn’t quite offer enough bang for your buck.

What are your thoughts on Xbox Game Pass? Are you a subscriber? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming guides, check out the following:

  • Uncharted 5 Release Date Rumors, Explained
  • Will GTA 6 Be Delayed Again in 2026? All Delays, Explained

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion
